chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Admiralty Suit No.–6 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.520/2025. 2. For orders on office objections a/w reply of counsel as flagged. 3. For orders on CMA No.521/2025. 19.09.2025 Mr. Riaz Ahmed Phulpoto, Advocate for the plaintiff. ------------------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2&3. Learned counsel for the plaintiff concedes that in the circumstances the ingredients of Section 4 of the Admiralty Jurisdiction of the High Courts Ordinance, 1980, may not be made out and he seeks return of plaint of this lis so that the same may be filed before the proper forum impleading the necessary parties. The plaint is hereby returned subject to all legal implications that may arise. The counsel requests that as notice has not been issued, therefore, he may be allowed to move an application for return of Court fee. He is at liberty to do so. The suit is disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. J U D G E Asif
